scroll_found.title: Research the Rec Yucatan scroll at a Research Pedestal

temple.title: Find a Call of Yucatan temple structure — Kukulkan shrine or Ah Puch ritual site

subtitle.text: Kukulkan was the feathered serpent. Ah Puch was the lord of death. Both are still here.

description: CH.05 · ON YUCATAN
▸ Call of Yucatan adds Mesoamerican mythology to the world.
Temples. Gods. Guardians.
Not all of them are dead.
◈ CALL OF YUCATAN — BOSSES
└ ✦ Kukulkan: the feathered serpent god
found in jungle/savanna pyramid structures
drops: feathered scales, Kukulkan trophy, rare items
attack: wind blast, flight, lightning feathers
└ ✦ Ah Puch: lord of death and decay
found in underground ritual chambers
drops: death fragments, bone relics, rare drops
attack: death aura, skeletal summons, decay curse
◈ WHY CULTURE CHAPTER
└ The Yucatan civilization is one of the Nine Fallen
└ Their temples are the most intact ruins
└ Inside: best early-game unique loot tables
└ Kukulkan drops feathers used in arrow crafting
└ Ah Puch drops are used in late-game curse recipes
◈ SCROLL: On Yucatan
└ Found in: Mayan/Aztec ruin chests, jungle temple loot,
hidden altar rooms
└ Research time: 20 min
└ Unlocks: Kukulkan + Ah Puch awareness,
temple structure loot knowledge
▸ The scroll describes both gods in reverence.
The writer respected them.
You are going to fight them.
Prepare accordingly.
▶ Find the On Yucatan scroll [check]
▶ Find a Call of Yucatan temple structure [check]
◇ ▲ DO NOT fight Kukulkan or Ah Puch
until Ch09+ with full gear.
Their damage output is high.
Their drops are worth waiting for.
